## Summary

Track repository-specific OpenSSF Best Practices enrollment and security-readiness follow-up.

## Checklist

- [ ] Review `OPENSSF.md`.
- [ ] Confirm `SECURITY.md`, `RELEASE.md`, `TESTING.md`, and contribution guidance are current.
- [ ] Confirm dependency automation targets `develop`.
- [ ] Confirm privileged workflows do not run untrusted pull request code.
- [ ] Confirm release evidence is attached to trusted releases.
- [ ] Enroll the project in OpenSSF Best Practices if this repository is a public product repository.
- [ ] Add an OpenSSF Best Practices badge only after the project is enrolled and passing.
